title: Hermes Agentic OS is Insane... just watch
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates Hermes Agentic OS, a system that integrates Hermes, Claude, ChatGPT, and other tools into a unified operating system for agents. The platform includes features like context isolation, a dreaming function for overnight insights, persona management, memory stacking, and artifact handling across multiple AI spend channels.
